descriptionShort: University of Saskatchewan Huskies ice hockey game box scores and player statistics from November 1987 regular season.
descriptionLong: Box scores and statistics from two University of Saskatchewan Huskies ice hockey games on November 30, 1987. The Huskies defeated UBC 8-1 and Saskatchewan 5-3. Detailed goal scorers, penalty information, and season statistics for Saskatchewan players including Morrison (21 goals, 35 points) and Leier (26 points) are provided.
